parameters.query:
INSERT INTO sync_runs (
  entity_name,
  run_status,
  started_at,
  fetched_count,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  now(),
  $3,
  now(),
  now()
)
RETURNING id AS sync_run_id, entity_name, run_status, started_at, fetched_count;

INSERT INTO raw_tally_purchase_orders (
  sync_run_id,
  erp_sync_id,
  po_number,
  po_date,
  total_amount,
  status,
  source_hash,
  raw_payload,
  fetched_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4,
  $5,
  $6,
  $7,
  $8::jsonb,
  now(),
  now()
)
ON CONFLICT (erp_sync_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  sync_run_id = EXCLUDED.sync_run_id,
  po_number = EXCLUDED.po_number,
  po_date = EXCLUDED.po_date,
  total_amount = EXCLUDED.total_amount,
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  source_hash = EXCLUDED.source_hash,
  raw_payload = EXCLUDED.raw_payload,
  fetched_at = now(),
  updated_at = now()
RETURNING id, erp_sync_id, po_number;

INSERT INTO purchase_orders (
  po_number,
  po_date,
  total_amount,
  status,
  erp_sync_id,
  source_hash,
  last_synced_at,
  updated_at
)
SELECT
  r.po_number,
  r.po_date,
  r.total_amount,
  r.status,
  r.erp_sync_id,
  r.source_hash,
  now(),
  now()
FROM raw_tally_purchase_orders r
WHERE r.erp_sync_id = $1
ON CONFLICT (erp_sync_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  po_number = EXCLUDED.po_number,
  po_date = EXCLUDED.po_date,
  total_amount = EXCLUDED.total_amount,
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  source_hash = EXCLUDED.source_hash,
  last_synced_at = now(),
  updated_at = now()
WHERE purchase_orders.source_hash IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.source_hash
RETURNING id, po_number, erp_sync_id, source_hash;

UPDATE sync_runs
SET
  run_status = $2,
  completed_at = now(),
  error_count = $3,
  error_message = $4,
  updated_at = now()
WHERE id = $1
RETURNING id, entity_name, run_status, completed_at, error_count, error_message;

UPDATE sync_runs
SET
  run_status = $2,
  completed_at = now(),
  fetched_count = $3,
  staged_count = $4,
  promoted_count = $5,
  skipped_count = $6,
  error_count = $7,
  updated_at = now()
WHERE id = $1
RETURNING id, entity_name, run_status, completed_at, fetched_count, staged_count, promoted_count, skipped_count, error_count;

WITH deactivated AS (
  UPDATE purchase_orders p
  SET
    is_active = false,
    deleted_at = now(),
    status = 'Inactive',
    updated_at = now()
  WHERE p.is_active = true
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM raw_tally_purchase_orders r
      WHERE r.erp_sync_id = p.erp_sync_id
        AND r.sync_run_id = $1
        AND r.is_active = true
    )
  RETURNING p.id AS po_id
)
SELECT $1::text AS id, COUNT(*) AS deactivated_count FROM deactivated;

WITH reactivated AS (
  UPDATE purchase_orders p
  SET
    is_active = true,
    deleted_at = null,
    updated_at = now()
  FROM raw_tally_purchase_orders r
  WHERE r.erp_sync_id = p.erp_sync_id
    AND r.sync_run_id = $1
    AND r.is_active = true
    AND (p.is_active = false OR p.deleted_at IS NOT NULL)
  RETURNING p.id AS po_id
)
SELECT $1::text AS id, COUNT(*) AS reactivated_count FROM reactivated;

INSERT INTO raw_tally_purchase_order_lines (
  sync_run_id,
  erp_sync_id,
  parent_erp_sync_id,
  line_number,
  item_description,
  quantity,
  unit_price,
  total_amount,
  source_hash,
  raw_payload,
  fetched_at,
  updated_at,
  is_active,
  deleted_at
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4,
  $5,
  NULLIF($6::text, 'null')::numeric,
  NULLIF($7::text, 'null')::numeric,
  NULLIF($8::text, 'null')::numeric,
  $9,
  $10::jsonb,
  now(),
  now(),
  true,
  null
)
ON CONFLICT (erp_sync_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  sync_run_id = EXCLUDED.sync_run_id,
  parent_erp_sync_id = EXCLUDED.parent_erp_sync_id,
  line_number = EXCLUDED.line_number,
  item_description = EXCLUDED.item_description,
  quantity = EXCLUDED.quantity,
  unit_price = EXCLUDED.unit_price,
  total_amount = EXCLUDED.total_amount,
  source_hash = EXCLUDED.source_hash,
  raw_payload = EXCLUDED.raw_payload,
  fetched_at = now(),
  updated_at = now(),
  is_active = true,
  deleted_at = null
RETURNING id, erp_sync_id, parent_erp_sync_id, line_number;

INSERT INTO purchase_order_lines (
  po_id,
  line_number,
  item_description,
  quantity,
  unit_price,
  total_amount,
  erp_sync_id,
  source_hash,
  last_synced_at,
  is_active,
  deleted_at
)
SELECT
  p.id AS po_id,
  r.line_number,
  r.item_description,
  r.quantity,
  r.unit_price,
  r.total_amount,
  r.erp_sync_id,
  r.source_hash,
  now(),
  true,
  null
FROM raw_tally_purchase_order_lines r
JOIN purchase_orders p
  ON p.erp_sync_id = r.parent_erp_sync_id
WHERE r.erp_sync_id = $1
ON CONFLICT (erp_sync_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  po_id = EXCLUDED.po_id,
  line_number = EXCLUDED.line_number,
  item_description = EXCLUDED.item_description,
  quantity = EXCLUDED.quantity,
  unit_price = EXCLUDED.unit_price,
  total_amount = EXCLUDED.total_amount,
  source_hash = EXCLUDED.source_hash,
  last_synced_at = now(),
  is_active = true,
  deleted_at = null
WHERE purchase_order_lines.source_hash IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.source_hash
RETURNING id, po_id, erp_sync_id, line_number, item_description;

WITH deactivated AS (
  UPDATE purchase_order_lines p
  SET
    is_active = false,
    deleted_at = now()
  WHERE p.is_active = true
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM raw_tally_purchase_order_lines r
      WHERE r.erp_sync_id = p.erp_sync_id
        AND r.sync_run_id = $1
        AND r.is_active = true
    )
  RETURNING p.id AS line_id
)
SELECT $1::text AS id, COUNT(*) AS deactivated_count FROM deactivated;

WITH reactivated AS (
  UPDATE purchase_order_lines p
  SET
    is_active = true,
    deleted_at = null
  FROM raw_tally_purchase_order_lines r
  WHERE r.erp_sync_id = p.erp_sync_id
    AND r.sync_run_id = $1
    AND r.is_active = true
    AND (p.is_active = false OR p.deleted_at IS NOT NULL)
  RETURNING p.id AS line_id
)
SELECT $1::text AS id, COUNT(*) AS reactivated_count FROM reactivated;
